full_text:
Jin Shang 金尚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Shang (金尚)was born in Jingzhao. Imperial Protector of Yangzhou. Executed after declining office from Yuan Shu. Jin Shang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Jin Shang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
